# CausalMixGPD

**CausalMixGPD** implements Dirichlet process mixture models (CRP or
stick-breaking) with an optional generalized Pareto tail and a
consistent prediction API.

## Installation

``` r

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github(
  "arnabaich96/CausalMixGPD",
  build_vignettes = TRUE,
  INSTALL_opts = c("--html")
)
```

## Reference

- [**Function
  reference**](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/index.html)

## Additional docs

- [**Package
  roadmap**](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/start/roadmap.html)

## Performance Acceptance Workflow

- Acceptance gate tests: `tests/testthat/test-performance-acceptance.R`
- Checklist-to-test mapping: `tests/perf/acceptance_checklist_map.md`
- Benchmark script: `tests/perf/benchmark_acceptance.R`
- Required benchmark artifact:
  `tests/perf/benchmark_acceptance_report.md`
- Phase 2 benchmark script: `tests/perf/benchmark_phase2.R`
- Phase 2 benchmark artifact: `tests/perf/benchmark_phase2_report.md`

Use `DPMIXGPD_TEST_LEVEL=ci` for CI-level acceptance checks and
`DPMIXGPD_TEST_LEVEL=full` for full seeded-equivalence runs.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`dAmoroso()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso.md)
  [`pAmoroso()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso.md)
  [`qAmoroso()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso.md)
  [`rAmoroso()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso.md)
  : Amoroso distribution
- [`dAmorosoGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso_gpd.md)
  [`pAmorosoGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso_gpd.md)
  [`rAmorosoGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso_gpd.md)
  [`qAmorosoGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso_gpd.md)
  : Amoroso with a GPD tail
- [`damorosomix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso_lowercase.md)
  [`pamorosomix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso_lowercase.md)

  [`ramorosomixgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso_lowercase.md)

  : Lowercase vectorized Amoroso distribution functions

  [`pAmorosoMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso_mix.md)

  [`pAmorosoMixGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso_mixgpd.md)
  [`rAmorosoMixGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso_mixgpd.md)
  [`qAmorosoMixGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/amoroso_mixgpd.md)
  : Amoroso mixture with a GPD tail
- [`ate()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/ate.md)
  : Average treatment effects, marginal over the empirical covariate
  distribution
- [`ate_rmean()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/ate_rmean.md)
  : Restricted-mean ATE helper
- [`att()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/att.md)
  : Average treatment effects standardized to treated covariates
- [`dgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/base_lowercase.md)
  [`pgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/base_lowercase.md)
  [`qgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/base_lowercase.md)
  [`rgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/base_lowercase.md)

  [`pinvgauss()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/base_lowercase.md)
  [`qinvgauss()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/base_lowercase.md)
  [`rinvgauss()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/base_lowercase.md)

  [`dcauchy_vec()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/base_lowercase.md)
  [`pcauchy_vec()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/base_lowercase.md)
  [`qcauchy_vec()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/base_lowercase.md)
  [`rcauchy_vec()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/base_lowercase.md)
  : Lowercase vectorized distribution functions (base kernels)
- [`build_causal_bundle()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/build_causal_bundle.md)
  : Build a causal bundle (design + two outcome arms)
- [`build_nimble_bundle()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/build_nimble_bundle.md)
  : Build the explicit one-arm NIMBLE bundle
- [`bundle()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/bundle.md)
  : Build the workflow bundle used by the package fitters
- [`cate()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/cate.md)
  : Conditional average treatment effects
- [`dCauchy()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/cauchy.md)
  [`pCauchy()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/cauchy.md)

  : Cauchy distribution

  [`pCauchyMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/cauchy_mix.md)
  [`rCauchyMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/cauchy_mix.md)
  [`qCauchyMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/cauchy_mix.md)
  : Cauchy mixture distribution
- [`dcauchymix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/cauchy_mix_lowercase.md)
  [`pcauchymix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/cauchy_mix_lowercase.md)
  [`qcauchymix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/cauchy_mix_lowercase.md)
  [`rcauchymix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/cauchy_mix_lowercase.md)
  : Lowercase vectorized Cauchy mixture distribution functions
- [`causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3.md)
  : causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3 dataset
- [`causal_alt_pos500_p5_k4_tail`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/causal_alt_pos500_p5_k4_tail.md)
  : causal_alt_pos500_p5_k4_tail dataset
- [`causal_alt_real500_p4_k2`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/causal_alt_real500_p4_k2.md)
  : causal_alt_real500_p4_k2 dataset
- [`causal_pos500_p3_k2`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/causal_pos500_p3_k2.md)
  : causal_pos500_p3_k2 dataset
- [`check_glue_validity()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/check_glue_validity.md)
  : Validate bulk+tail glue for MixGPD predictive distribution
- [`cqte()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/cqte.md)
  : Conditional quantile treatment effects
- [`dpmgpd.causal()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/dpmgpd.causal.md)
  : Fit a causal two-arm Dirichlet process mixture with a spliced GPD
  tail
- [`dpmgpd.cluster()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/dpmgpd.cluster.md)
  : Fit a clustering-only bulk-tail model
- [`dpmgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/dpmgpd.md)
  : Fit a one-arm Dirichlet process mixture with a spliced GPD tail
- [`dpmix.causal()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/dpmix.causal.md)
  : Fit a causal two-arm Dirichlet process mixture without a GPD tail
- [`dpmix.cluster()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/dpmix.cluster.md)
  : Fit a clustering-only bulk model
- [`dpmix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/dpmix.md)
  : Fit a one-arm Dirichlet process mixture without a GPD tail
- [`ess_summary()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/ess_summary.md)
  : Effective sample size summaries for fitted models
- [`fitted(`*`<mixgpd_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/fitted.mixgpd_fit.md)
  : Fitted values on the training design

  [`pLaplaceMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/laplace_mix.md)
  [`rLaplaceMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/laplace_mix.md)

  [`rLaplaceMixGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/laplace_MixGpd.md)
  [`qLaplaceMixGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/laplace_MixGpd.md)
  : Laplace mixture with a GPD tail
- [`dLognormalGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_gpd.md)
  [`pLognormalGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_gpd.md)
  [`rLognormalGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_gpd.md)
  [`qLognormalGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_gpd.md)
  : Lognormal with a GPD tail
- [`dlognormalmix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  [`plognormalmix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  [`qlognormalmix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  [`rlognormalmix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  [`dlognormalmixgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  [`plognormalmixgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  [`qlognormalmixgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  [`rlognormalmixgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  [`dlognormalgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  [`plognormalgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  [`qlognormalgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  [`rlognormalgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_lowercase.md)
  : Lowercase vectorized lognormal distribution functions
- [`dLognormalMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_mix.md)
  [`pLognormalMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_mix.md)
  [`rLognormalMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_mix.md)
  [`qLognormalMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_mix.md)
  : Lognormal mixture distribution
- [`dLognormalMixGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_mixgpd.md)
  [`pLognormalMixGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_mixgpd.md)
  [`rLognormalMixGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_mixgpd.md)
  [`qLognormalMixGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/lognormal_mixgpd.md)
  : Lognormal mixture with a GPD tail
- [`mcmc()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/mcmc.md)
  : Run posterior sampling from a prepared bundle
- [`nc_pos200_k3`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/nc_pos200_k3.md)
  : nc_pos200_k3 dataset

- [`dNormGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_gpd.md)
  [`pNormGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_gpd.md)
  [`rNormGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_gpd.md)
  [`qNormGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_gpd.md)
  : Normal with a GPD tail
- [`dnormmix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_lowercase.md)
  [`pnormmix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_lowercase.md)
  [`qnormmix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_lowercase.md)

  [`pnormmixgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_lowercase.md)
  [`qnormmixgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_lowercase.md)
  [`rnormmixgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_lowercase.md)
  [`dnormgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_lowercase.md)
  [`pnormgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_lowercase.md)
  [`qnormgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_lowercase.md)
  [`rnormgpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_lowercase.md)
  : Lowercase vectorized normal distribution functions
- [`dNormMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_mix.md)
  [`pNormMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/normal_mix.md)

- [`params()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/params.md)
  : Extract posterior mean parameters in natural shape
- [`plot(`*`<causalmixgpd_ate>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/plot.causalmixgpd_ate.md)
  : Plot ATE-style effect summaries

  : Plot the treated and control outcome fits from a causal model

  : Plot causal prediction outputs

  : Plot QTE-style effect summaries

  : Plot a cluster bundle

  : Plot a cluster posterior similarity matrix

  : Plot MCMC diagnostics for a MixGPD fit (ggmcmc backend)
- [`plot(`*`<mixgpd_fitted>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/plot.mixgpd_fitted.md)
  : Plot fitted values diagnostics

  : Plot prediction results

  : Predict arm-specific and contrast-scale quantities from a causal fit
- [`predict(`*`<dpmixgpd_cluster_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/predict.dpmixgpd_cluster_fit.md)
  : Predict labels or similarity matrices from a cluster fit
- [`predict(`*`<mixgpd_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/predict.mixgpd_fit.md)
  : Posterior predictive summaries from a fitted one-arm model
- [`print(`*`<causalmixgpd_ate>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/print.causalmixgpd_ate.md)
  : Print an ATE-style effect object

  : Print method for causal prediction plots

  : Print a propensity score fit

  : Print cluster labels

  : Print a cluster posterior similarity matrix

  : Print a one-arm fitted model

  : Print method for fitted value plots

  : Print method for mixgpd_fit diagnostic plots
- [`print(`*`<mixgpd_predict_plots>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/print.mixgpd_predict_plots.md)
  : Print method for prediction plots
- [`print(`*`<mixgpd_summary>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/print.mixgpd_summary.md)
  : Print a MixGPD summary object
- [`print(`*`<summary.causalmixgpd_ate>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/print.summary.causalmixgpd_ate.md)
  : Print an ATE summary
- [`print(`*`<summary.causalmixgpd_qte>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/print.summary.causalmixgpd_qte.md)
  : Print a QTE summary
- [`qte()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/qte.md)
  : Quantile treatment effects, marginal over the empirical covariate
  distribution
- [`qtt()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/qtt.md)
  : Quantile treatment effects standardized to treated covariates
- [`residuals(`*`<mixgpd_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/residuals.mixgpd_fit.md)
  : Residual diagnostics on the training design
- [`run_mcmc_bundle_manual()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/run_mcmc_bundle_manual.md)
  : Run posterior sampling for a prepared one-arm bundle
- [`run_mcmc_causal()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/run_mcmc_causal.md)
  : Run posterior sampling for a causal bundle
- [`sim_bulk_tail()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/sim_bulk_tail.md)
  : Simulate positive bulk-tail data
- [`sim_causal_qte()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/sim_causal_qte.md)
  : Simulate causal quantile-treatment-effect data
- [`sim_survival_tail()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/sim_survival_tail.md)
  : Simulate censored survival-style tail data
- [`summary(`*`<causalmixgpd_ate>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/summary.causalmixgpd_ate.md)
  : Summarize an ATE-style effect object
- [`summary(`*`<causalmixgpd_bundle>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/summary.causalmixgpd_bundle.md)
  : Summarize a one-arm workflow bundle
- [`summary(`*`<causalmixgpd_causal_bundle>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/summary.causalmixgpd_causal_bundle.md)
  : Summarize a causal workflow bundle
- [`summary(`*`<causalmixgpd_causal_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/summary.causalmixgpd_causal_fit.md)
  : Summarize a fitted causal model
- [`summary(`*`<causalmixgpd_qte>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/summary.causalmixgpd_qte.md)
  : Summarize a QTE-style effect object
- [`summary(`*`<dpmixgpd_cluster_bundle>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/summary.dpmixgpd_cluster_bundle.md)
  : Summarize a cluster bundle
- [`summary(`*`<dpmixgpd_cluster_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/summary.dpmixgpd_cluster_fit.md)
  : Summarize a cluster fit
- [`summary(`*`<dpmixgpd_cluster_labels>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/summary.dpmixgpd_cluster_labels.md)
  : Summarize cluster labels
- [`summary(`*`<dpmixgpd_cluster_psm>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/summary.dpmixgpd_cluster_psm.md)
  : Summarize a cluster posterior similarity matrix
- [`summary(`*`<mixgpd_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/reference/summary.mixgpd_fit.md)
  : Summarize posterior draws from a one-arm fitted model
